name: rp2040_s3jtag_stage1
description: Rule-B Stage 1 for RP2040 via S3JTAG. This stage is reserved for future no-wire self-tests such as internal temperature, timer/mailbox, PWM LED, and flash-read checks. No validated Stage 1 no-wire tests beyond the current Stage 0 baseline have been formalized yet.
notes: Temporary transitional pack. The same mailbox runtime-gate asset is currently the closest available no-wire baseline until dedicated Stage 1 self-tests are added.
